title: German-Style Boudin Noir Tart
description: A twist on the traditional French dish, this German-Style Boudin Noir Tart combines savory flavors with a crispy crust.

ingredients.name: German mustard
ingredients.notes: Adds a tangy, slightly spicy flavor

instructions: Roll out the tart crust and place it on a baking sheet.
In a pan over medium heat, cook the boudin noir, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the fried onions, German mustard, and heavy cream to the pan and stir to combine.
Pour the boudin mixture into the tart crust and spread it evenly.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
Remove the tart from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
